REMARK: STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S EX PARTE APPLICATION OF TO DISMISS COMPLAINT AND VACATE THE DECEMBER 5 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING IS DENIED. THE MOTION CAN BE HEARD AS A REGULARLY NOTICED MOTION.

LAW AND MOTION 302, NOV-14-2023. HEARING RE: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS COMPLAINT FOLLOWING PLAINTIFFS FAILURE TO AMEND. RULING IS ARGUED. THE COURT NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS REGARDING PROVIDING NOTICE OF THE INTENT TO APPEAR TO CONSTEST THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU) ***AFTER HEARING, AN ORDER IS SIGNED.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Complaint Following Plaintiffs Failure To Amend; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declaration Of Kyla Lowery In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

You Liang Song, in court, in propria persona Plaintiff.

Aidong Ni, certified court interpreter, in court, assisting Plaintiff in translating proceedings from English into Mandarin and Mandarin into English.

Kyla Lowery, via Zoom, of the STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA, OFFICE OF GENERAL COUNSEL, (213) 765-1068, for Defendant.

RE: Defendant's Motion To Dismiss Complaint Following Plaintiffs Failure To Amend.

Ruling is argued. The court notes that Plaintiff failed to follow instructions regarding providing notice of the intent to appear to constest the court's tentative ruling. At conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order is signed.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2023 Continued To Dec-05-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA COMPLAINT REVIEW UNIT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT

Appearances: Kyla Lowery of the State Bar of California Office of General Counsel (213.765.1068) appearing via Zoom for the defendant and moving party; You Liang Song (415.799.6055) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona.

Discussed and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant's unopposed demurrer to complaint is sustained with leave to amend. Order signed. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (302/RBU)
